response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise with extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and cloud infrastructure across multiple high-profile companies. However, his background leans more toward full-stack development (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js) and leadership in product engineering rather than deep specialization in C++, distributed systems, or cloud architecture as required for this role. His recent roles at Google and Meta lack explicit focus on cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture.
strengths: Strong leadership and mentorship experience, including organizing workshops and training sessions.
Proven ability to lead large-scale projects and mentor teams, as seen in roles at Google and Meta.
Broad technical expertise across multiple languages and domains, including distributed systems and infrastructure.
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ and cloud compute platforms, which are core requirements for this role.
Most recent experience is in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure rather than cloud architecture or distributed compute systems.
Lacks explicit production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs, as preferred.
